15,000,000 ARB Airdrop

Round 1 of the $ARB
Airdrop is on the way!

Check Eligibility

Rules to participants

Your wallet must comply with several rules listed below.

5+ Transactions & On-Chain History

To qualify, your wallet must have at least 5 unique transactions prior to the snapshot date. This includes swaps, bridge transfers, or dApp interactions. Wallets with low or fake activity may be disqualified to prevent abuse or multi-accounting. Activity across the Arbitrum ecosystem increases your reward weight.

One Wallet — One Airdrop

Each participant is allowed to claim the airdrop only once. Duplicate wallets, shared devices, or wallets associated with bot activity are automatically blacklisted. Make sure you're using a self-custodied address (not exchange or proxy wallets). On average, eligible wallets receive up to 1,000 $ARB, based on past usage and contribution level.

Arbitrum Rollup

Arbitrum makes Ethereum faster and cheaper. Build apps or use DeFi protocols with low gas fees — without giving up Ethereum-level security.

Arbitrum Orbit

Want your own chain? Arbitrum Orbit lets you launch custom blockchains that connect to Arbitrum — ideal for dApps, games, and entire ecosystems.

V3 Arbitrum AnyTrust

Need maximum speed with minimal cost? AnyTrust chains are perfect for social, gaming, and micro-payment apps — with full security guarantees.

Our Products

Arbitrum delivers unmatched speed and low fees — without compromising Ethereum-level security. Our Layer 2 ecosystem powers the future of DeFi, gaming, NFTs, and beyond.
